name: icloud-notes-exporter
description: iCloud Notes to Markdown exporter for Windows using Chrome DevTools Protocol

scripts.check: node --check src/main.mjs && node --check src/start-edge.mjs && node --check src/verify-env.mjs && node --check src/cdp/connect.mjs && node --check src/cdp/store.mjs && node --check src/export/writer.mjs && node --check src/utils/filename.mjs && node --check src/utils/manifest.mjs && node --check src/utils/progress.mjs
